message:
test: add triage scoring/ordering + JSON schema tests

11 unit tests for the wa triage command contract:
- severity_rank ordering (error > warning > info)
- sort produces errors-first ordering
- sort stability across invocations (deterministic)
- severity filter at each level (error, warning, info)
- JSON schema structure validation (top-level + per-item)
- empty output schema
- valid sections and severity values
- combined sort + filter pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
